creator: kevin@your.org
text:
This panic appears to be fixed with the following patch:


Author: kevlo
Date: Fri Mar 25 05:01:13 2011
New Revision: 219982
URL: 
http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/219982


Log:
  Fix panic while associating access point.
  While here, add the SMC SMCWUSB-G
